GenAiFunction.description:
Answer the user's question using the CURRENTLY attached/open file in the conversation (the ContentDocument the user just shared). Reads the file directly — no search, no indexing.
Use when: - The user has attached a file in this turn and asks about it ("what does this say?", "summarize this", "find X in this file"). - The question is obviously about THIS document, not the broader knowledge base.
NOT for: - Searching across many uploaded documents in the Data Library — use SearchDataLibrary (which uses Data Cloud chunks). - Records in Salesforce objects — use QueryRecordsWithSoql. - Web content — use SearchWeb.
Respond concisely: TL;DR first, then detail. If the file does not contain the answer, say so plainly. Rewrite the user's follow-ups to include earlier conversation context before searching the file.
GenAiFunction.masterLabel: MyOrgButler: Answer Questions With Current File
